title: For Adventure Edit — pre-Asia video aesthetic plan (2024)
html:
For Adventure Edit — pre-Asia video aesthetic plan (2024)

Source: 2024-08-31 Apple Note. Aesthetic-direction note for a planned travel-video edit, written ~2 weeks before Yahir leaves for the China-immersion trip.

TL;DR

  • Structure spec: starting/ending scene of "days flashing by" — the canonical adventure-montage frame.
  • Emotional spec: "show the oscillation of beautiful moments and darker moments" — explicit non-glamour intent. Same authenticity-instinct as departing China note.
  • Music shortlist: A Moment Apart (ODESZA), I've Been Thinking About Dying, Iris — these are the scoring intentions for the trip-video.
  • Outro: "end with Lower Your Eyelids to Die With the Sun by M83" — the most committed creative decision in the note. M83's track as the goodbye-frame for the China chapter.
  • Pre-trip artistic intent as planning artifact — Yahir treats the study abroad departure as a film he's about to direct, not just travel.

Connections

  • shanghai study abroad
  • china chapter
  • 2024 12 14 departing china
  • six month adventure creed

related.label: Departing China — that's a wrap to this chapter
